channel.title: GitHub Vue Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: moeru-ai/airi
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

item.title: Hunlongyu/ZY-Player
item.description: ▶️ 跨平台桌面端视频资源播放器.简洁无广告.免费高颜值. 🎞

item.title: CorentinTh/it-tools
item.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

item.title: OpenCSGs/csghub
item.description: CSGHub is a brand-new open-source platform for managing LLMs, developed by the OpenCSG team. It offers both open-source and on-premise/SaaS solutions, with features comparable to Hugging Face. Gain full control over the lifecycle of LLMs, datasets, and agents, with Python SDK compatibility with Hugging Face. Join us! ⭐️

item.title: algerkong/AlgerMusicPlayer
item.description: 一个第三方音乐播放器、本地服务、桌面歌词、音乐下载、远程控制

item.title: iAJue/MoeKoeMusic
item.description: 一款开源简洁高颜值的酷狗第三方客户端 An open-source, concise, and aesthetically pleasing third-party client for KuGou that supports Windows / macOS / Linux / Web

item.title: VueTorrent/VueTorrent
item.description: The sleekest looking WEBUI for qBittorrent made with Vuejs!

item.title: BewlyBewly/BewlyBewly
item.description: Just make a few small changes to your Bilibili homepage. (English | 简体中文 | 正體中文 | 廣東話)

item.title: qier222/YesPlayMusic
item.description: 高颜值的第三方网易云播放器，支持 Windows / macOS / Linux

item.title: ccbikai/Sink
item.description: ⚡ A Simple / Speedy / Secure Link Shortener with Analytics, 100% run on Cloudflare.

item.title: zyronon/douyin
item.description: Vue3 + Pinia 仿抖音，Vue 在移动端的最佳实践 . Imitate TikTok ，Vue Best practices on Mobile

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: pulsejet/memories
item.description: Fast, modern and advanced photo management suite. Runs as a Nextcloud app.

item.title: pure-admin/vue-pure-admin
item.description: 全面ESM+Vue3+Vite+Element-Plus+TypeScript编写的一款后台管理系统（兼容移动端）

item.title: crmeb/CRMEB
item.description: 🔥CRMEB开源商城免费开源多语言商城系统，Tp6框架商城，系统可商用；包含小程序商城、H5商城、公众号商城、PC商城、App，支持分销、拼团、砍价、秒杀、优惠券、积分、会员等级、小程序直播、页面DIY，前后端分离，方便二开，更有详细使用文档、接口文档、数据字典、二开文档/视频教程，欢迎大家提出宝贵意见和建议
